name_cn:
Authentic Grade
Soft16 Small Size, All Eyes on You. If you felt the Large size was too big, this size is definitely for you. The small size is more everyday, seemingly simple but very durable to look at, low-key and stylish~ Lightweight, soft and comfortable leather, strong structured shape, a must-have for Autumn/Winter!
Size:32.5×23×14
Style No.:195543 Grainy Leather Black
